meaning: vt.在金属外覆以另一种金属adj.穿衣的 vbl.clothe的过去式和过去分词
examples: Johnson was clad casually in slacks and a light blue golf shirt.
The door closed and a sweet young girl, richly clad, bounded toward him.
She was clad in blue velvet.
Not to mention the snow-capped peaks, bell-clad cows and open-air cable cars of Swiss fantasies.
She says her neighborhood, Adhamiya, is no longer permissive if she is not clad so modestly.
